tweetText: Trump officials are reportedly urging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model, despite the Department of Defense labeling Anthropic a supply-chain risk. This raises concerns about the safety and reliability of using AI in financial systems. via TechCrunch AI
AI is creating a flood of new terms and slang, leading to confusion. A new glossary offers clear definitions to help everyone understand the evolving language of AI. via TechCrunch AI
At the HumanX conference in San Francisco, Anthropic's AI model Claude stole the spotlight. This highlights the growing influence of AI technologies in shaping industry discussions. via TechCrunch AI

The AI code wars are intensifying as tools like GitHub Copilot revolutionize how developers write code. This shift could reshape programming practices and enhance productivity in tech. via The Verge AI
